full_text:
Li Damu [Big-Eyes Li]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Damu [Big-Eyes Li]. Killed by Yuan Shao after many years as a bandit in Taihang. Li Damu [Big-Eyes Li] was a bandit Li Damu [Big-Eyes Li] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
